channel.title: The Carry
channel.description: Weekly market intelligence from the institutional sell-side research desk to the FT Alphaville comment section.
channel.itunes:author: The Carry

item.title: The Carry: Building castles in the sky, one new share at a time: How companies fund growth with fantasy paper
item.description: Building castles in the sky, one new share at a time — Institutional research + FT Alphaville. Week of 2026-06-19.
